/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ivi_dashboard.dir/ivi_dashboard_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ivi_dashboard.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ivi_dashboard.dir/src/VehicleStateModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ivi_dashboard.dir/src/GatewayClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ivi_dashboard.dir/ivi_dashboard_autogen/CCBC4FUR7J/qrc_qml.cpp.o -o ivi_dashboard  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/anaconda3/lib /opt/anaconda3/lib/libQt5Quick.5.15.2.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/libQt5WebSockets.5.15.2.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/libQt5Gui.5.15.2.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/libQt5QmlModels.5.15.2.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/libQt5Qml.5.15.2.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/libQt5Network.5.15.2.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/libQt5Core.5.15.2.dylib
